label: Exhaust settings
description: Particle exhaust emission settings for a gravship thruster.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this thruster emits exhaust particles. Default true.

exhaustFleckDef.label: Exhaust fleck def
exhaustFleckDef.description: FleckDef used for exhaust particles. Private field in source; set by XML directly. Resolved at runtime to GravshipThrusterExhaust if absent.

emissionsPerSecond.label: Emissions per second
emissionsPerSecond.description: Number of exhaust particles emitted per second. Default 10.

spawnOffset.label: Spawn offset
spawnOffset.description: World-space offset from the thruster origin at which particles spawn, as (x, y, z).

spawnRadiusRange.label: Spawn radius range
spawnRadiusRange.description: Random radius around the spawn offset within which particles may appear.

inheritGravshipRotation.label: Inherit gravship rotation
inheritGravshipRotation.description: Whether exhaust particles inherit the gravship's current rotation. Default true.

inheritThrusterRotation.label: Inherit thruster rotation
inheritThrusterRotation.description: Whether exhaust particles inherit this thruster's rotation. Default true.

velocity.label: Velocity
velocity.description: Initial velocity of exhaust particles as (x, y, z). Source default is (0, 0, -1).

velocityRotationRange.label: Velocity rotation range
velocityRotationRange.description: Random rotation range in degrees applied to the initial velocity direction.

velocityMultiplierRange.label: Velocity multiplier range
velocityMultiplierRange.description: Random multiplier applied to the initial velocity magnitude. Default 1~1.

rotationOverTimeRange.label: Rotation over time range
rotationOverTimeRange.description: Random rotation speed in degrees per second applied to particles over their lifetime.

scaleRange.label: Scale range
scaleRange.description: Random scale multiplier applied to particles at spawn. Default 1~1.
